title: RAG Pix Regulation
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for interpreting Brazilian Pix regulatory documents (BCB resolutions + MED 2.0). Compares baseline LLM responses against RAG-enhanced responses, evaluates retrieval quality (Recall@K, Precision@K), grounding, and hallucination rates with Phoenix observability.

title: Fraud Detection ML System
description: End-to-end machine learning system for card-not-present fraud detection. Cost-sensitive threshold optimization, temporal validation, modular ML pipelines, artifact versioning, FastAPI scoring service, Docker deployment, PSI-based drift monitoring, and automated retraining simulation. ROC-AUC 0.861, 58.7% expected loss reduction.

title: ML Experiment Analyst Agent
description: Autonomous AI agent that analyzes machine learning experiments from MLflow, detecting patterns like overfitting, correlating hyperparameters with performance, and proposing next experimental configurations with justifications. Includes governance mechanisms (token budgets, execution timeouts, audit trails) and human-in-the-loop workflows.

title: Bike Availability Forecasting System
description: End-to-end data engineering and ML system that forecasts bike availability in São Paulo's bike-sharing stations (Bike Itaú/Bike Sampa). Continuous pipeline ingests real-time GBFS data every 5 min via GitHub Actions, stores in PostgreSQL, and trains time-series models (baseline to LightGBM) for t+15 min predictions with drift monitoring.

title: Agentic Dev Tool (adt)
description: Production-ready Python CLI demonstrating agentic AI architecture. Routes natural language questions to specialized agents (repository analysis, GitHub project tracking, technical research) using OpenAI tool-calling capabilities with an MCP-style orchestration layer.

title: Customer Churn MLOps Pipeline
description: End-to-end ML pipeline for binary classification predicting customer churn in telecommunications. Covers the full ML lifecycle: data validation with Pandera, feature engineering, model training and evaluation, FastAPI deployment, and drift monitoring.

title: WiDS 2026 — Wildfire Threat Prediction
description: End-to-end ML pipeline for the WiDS Global Datathon 2026. Applies survival analysis techniques to predict when active wildfires will pose threats to evacuation zones using real-time Watch Duty data.
